channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Death toll in attack on Kyiv apartment building now stands at 24
item.description: Ukrainian President Zelenskyy reported that a Russian missile strike on a Kyiv apartment building killed 24 people.

item.title: Gen Z homeowners? Yes, more in their 20s are managing to buy despite the odds
item.description: More Gen Z adults own homes than millennials did at the same age, often without parental help.

item.title: Morning news brief
item.description: Trump returns from China trip; Supreme Court upholds abortion pill access; UK PM faces internal party challenges.

item.title: Which Trump cabinet member has a new reality show? The quiz knows
item.description: This week in Washington, D.C., the Senate confirmed Kevin Warsh as the next Federal Reserve chair, and a quiz question was written about his name.
